table.name: vtiger_cuatroq
table.sql: CREATE TABLE `vtiger_cuatroq` ( `cuatroqid` int(11) NOT NULL, `boxscore` decimal(19,0) DEFAULT NULL, `box_score_dataid` decimal(10,0) DEFAULT NULL, `semanalid` decimal(10,0) DEFAULT NULL, `fecha` date DEFAULT NULL, `id4q` varchar(255) NOT NULL, `automatico` varchar(255) DEFAULT '', PRIMARY KEY (`cuatroqid`), CONSTRAINT `vtiger_cuatroq_ibfk_1` FOREIGN KEY (`cuatroqid`) REFERENCES `vtiger_crmentity` (`crmid`) ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8

table.name: vtiger_cuatroqcf
table.sql: CREATE TABLE `vtiger_cuatroqcf` ( `cuatroqid` int(11) NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (`cuatroqid`), CONSTRAINT `vtiger_cuatroqcf_ibfk_1` FOREIGN KEY (`cuatroqid`) REFERENCES `vtiger_crmentity` (`crmid`) ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8
